LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING, LLC'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6 IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED CONSISTENT WITH THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. NO LATER THAN 8:30 AM ON JUNE 25, 2025, MOVING PARTY MUST SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER STATING THE MOTION IS GRANTED AND, SEPARATELY, A PROPOSED JUDGMENT WITH TEXT IDENTICAL TO THE TEXT OF THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Plaintiff'S Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6) Points And Authorities; Declaration; Order/Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC's Plaintiff's Motion To Enforce Settlement (C.C.P. Section 664.6).

Plaintiff LVNV Funding, LLC's unopposed motion to enforce settlement pursuant to Code of Civil procedure section 664.6 is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, judgment shall be entered consistent with the proposed order submitted with the moving papers.

No later than 8:30 am on June 25, 2025, Moving Party must submit a proposed order stating the motion is granted and, separately, a proposed judgment with text identical to the text of the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Moving Party shall send the proposed order by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
